# kong-gateway_group (Resource)

Group Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kong-gateway_group" "my_group" {
  comment    = "...my_comment..."
  created_at = 3
  id         = "...my_id..."
  name       = "...my_name..."
  updated_at = 2
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the group

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Any comments associated with the specific group.
- `created_at` (Number) Unix epoch when the resource was created.
- `id` (String) A string representing a UUID (universally unique identifier).
- `updated_at` (Number) Unix epoch when the resource was last updated.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = kong-gateway_group.my_kong-gateway_group
  id = "..."
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import kong-gateway_group.my_kong-gateway_group "..."
```
